description:
**Milestone:** Local Semantic Embeddings

Install @xenova/transformers as a production dependency in apps/server/package.json. Create apps/server/src/services/embedding-service.ts: lazy-loads the 'Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2' model on first use (model cached to DATA_DIR/models/ to persist across restarts). Methods: embed(text): Promise<Float32Array>, embedBatch(texts): Promise<Float32Array[]>, cosineSimilarity(a: Float32Array, b: Float32Array): number. Model download is non-blocking: service emits 'ready' event when loaded, operations queue until ready. Add embeddings column (BLOB) to chunks table in KnowledgeStoreService schema (ALTER TABLE if column doesn't exist). Add background embedding worker: after rebuildIndex(), for each chunk without an embedding, call embeddingService.embed(chunk.heading + ' ' + chunk.content) and UPDATE chunks SET embeddings = ? WHERE id = ?. This runs as an async background job, non-blocking. Add getEmbeddingStatus(projectPath) to KnowledgeStoreService returning {total, embedded, pending}.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/services/embedding-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/knowledge-store-service.ts
- apps/server/package.json

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] @xenova/transformers installed and importable in apps/server
- [ ] EmbeddingService lazy-loads model, queues requests until ready
- [ ] Model cached to DATA_DIR/models/ across restarts
- [ ] embeddings BLOB column added to chunks table with migration guard
- [ ] Background embedding worker populates embeddings non-blocking after rebuildIndex()
- [ ] cosineSimilarity() returns correct values (1.0 for identical vectors)
- [ ] npm run build:server passes

**Complexity:** large
title: EmbeddingService & SQLite Vector Storage
